entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS526) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO ADD DOMESTIC AND NON-DOMESTIC NBIP-VPNS PORT PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2721.01E. 2. TO ADD SED PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2755.02E. 3. TO ADD CCS UPDATES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2762.01S. 4. TO ADD CORRECT CASE DESCRIPTION, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2763.01S 5. TO ADD CSDES CHANGE TO CLIN, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2765.01S. 6. TO ADD ACCESS SHARED ETHERNET PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2772.01E 7. TO ADD ACCESS SHARED ETHERNET PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2773.01E

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO REVISE MNS PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2712.02E. 2. TO ADD SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2766.01E. 3. TO ADD SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2771.01E. 4. TO ADD CCS PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2786.01E 5. TO ADD CSDES PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2785.01E. 6. A PRICE REDUCTION, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2791.01P. 7. TO ADD MNS PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2797.02E. 8. TO REMOVE SED PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2802.01S.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS530) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS PRICING AND CASE NUMBER, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2754.01E. 2. TO REDUCE MNS FEATURE PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2799.02P. 3. TO ADD ICB CCS PRICES TO CHANGE THE 2015 TAX PROMPT FEATURES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2801.01E. 4. TO REDUCE PRICES FOR MTIPS 200 MBPS DOMESTIC PORT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2805.01P. 5. TO ADD FIVE (5) APPC SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2808.01E. 6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. TO ADD DOMESTIC WIRELINE ICB PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2711.01E. 2. TO ADD PREMISES WIRING ICB PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2777.01E. 3. TO ADD DOMESTIC WIRELINE ICB PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2782.01E. 4. TO ADD CCS PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2792.01E 5. TO ADD NBIP-VPNS CISCO PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2819.01E. 6. TO ADD CCS PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2821.01E. 7. TO ADD CCS PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU2822.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
